title: Buttery Crumbly Turkish Delight
description: A unique twist on traditional Turkish delight with a spicy twist for a special date-night treat featuring bhuna spices and dates.

ingredients.name: bhuna spices mix (see below)
ingredients.notes: Turkish Delight blend: fennel seeds, cardamom powder, cloves, star anise, cinnamon sticks for a warm, aromatic flavor.

instructions: Mix dates with softened butter until smooth and combined.
Gradually add brown sugar and mix well, ensuring no lumps remain.
Stir in cinnamon powder and ginger paste. Blend until the mixture forms a soft dough.
Add the bhuna spices mix to the dough, incorporating evenly into the mixture.
Shape the dough into small balls or cut it with cookie cutter for uniform pieces if desired.
Place the shaped pieces onto an ungreased baking sheet in a single layer.
Bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on the outside.
Allow to cool slightly before serving, garnished with additional spices like ground cardamom or cinnamon.
